intended_use: Velacur is intended to provide estimates of tissue stiffness generated from shear wave speed measurements (40-70Hz) and coefficient of attenuation. The device is indicated to non-invasively determine
intended_use_full: Velacur is intended to provide estimates of tissue stiffness generated from shear wave speed measurements (40-70Hz) and coefficient of attenuation. The device is indicated to non-invasively determine liver tissue stiffness and attenuation. These are meant to be used in conjunction with other clinical indicators in order to assist in clinical management of patients with liver disease.
target_condition: liver disease (non-alcoholic fatty liver disease, non-alcoholic steatohepatitis, chronic liver disease of all severities)
ground_truth: Manual image segmentation by expert sonographers (20+ years experience for Organ Segmentation Guide; 10+ years experience with masters/PhD for Wave Quality Guide); pixel-based voting method for Organ Segmentation and expert consensus for Wave Quality Guide
other_metrics: Dice Coefficient (Organ Segmentation Guide: >0.7 average; Wave Quality Guide: ≥0.7); pixel accuracy (>80%)
